properties.name: Anchorage Service Unit PRCDA
properties.description: The Anchorage Service Unit PRCDA covers the Municipality of Anchorage and surrounding areas, serving Alaska Native and American Indian people in the greater Anchorage metropolitan area with purchased/referred care services.

properties.name: Yukon-Kuskokwim PRCDA
properties.description: The Yukon-Kuskokwim PRCDA covers the vast YK Delta region in western Alaska, centered around Bethel. This area serves numerous Alaska Native villages across one of the most remote regions in the United States.

properties.name: Interior Alaska PRCDA
properties.description: The Interior Alaska PRCDA covers the vast interior region centered around Fairbanks, serving Alaska Native communities across the interior valleys and uplands of central Alaska.

properties.name: Southeast Alaska PRCDA
properties.description: The Southeast Alaska PRCDA covers the Alaska panhandle region, including Juneau, Sitka, Ketchikan, and surrounding communities. This coastal strip serves Tlingit, Haida, and Tsimshian peoples.

properties.name: Arctic Slope PRCDA
properties.description: The Arctic Slope PRCDA covers the North Slope Borough, the northernmost region of Alaska centered around Utqiagvik (formerly Barrow). This area serves Inupiat communities across the Arctic coast.

properties.name: Bristol Bay PRCDA
properties.description: The Bristol Bay PRCDA covers the Bristol Bay region in southwestern Alaska, centered around Dillingham. This area serves Yupik and Athabascan communities in the Bristol Bay watershed.

properties.name: Norton Sound PRCDA
properties.description: The Norton Sound PRCDA covers the Bering Strait and Norton Sound region of western Alaska, centered around Nome. This area serves Inupiat and Yupik communities along the coast.

properties.name: Crow PRCDA
properties.description: The Crow PRCDA covers the Crow Indian Reservation in south-central Montana, home to the Apsaalooke (Crow) people. Eligible members can receive purchased/referred care through this delivery area.

properties.name: Northern Cheyenne PRCDA
properties.description: The Northern Cheyenne PRCDA covers the Northern Cheyenne Indian Reservation in southeastern Montana, adjacent to the Crow Reservation.

properties.name: Blackfeet PRCDA
properties.description: The Blackfeet PRCDA covers the Blackfeet Indian Reservation in northwest Montana, adjacent to Glacier National Park. This is the homeland of the Blackfeet (Niitsitapi) people.

properties.name: Fort Belknap PRCDA
properties.description: The Fort Belknap PRCDA covers the Fort Belknap Indian Reservation in north-central Montana, home to the Assiniboine (Nakoda) and Gros Ventre (Aaniiih) tribes.

properties.name: Fort Peck PRCDA
properties.tribeName: Fort Peck Assiniboine and Sioux Tribes
properties.description: The Fort Peck PRCDA covers the Fort Peck Indian Reservation in northeastern Montana, home to the Assiniboine and Sioux tribes.

properties.name: Rocky Boy's PRCDA
properties.description: The Rocky Boy's PRCDA covers the Rocky Boy's Indian Reservation in north-central Montana near Havre, home to the Chippewa Cree tribe.

properties.name: Wind River PRCDA
properties.description: The Wind River PRCDA covers the Wind River Indian Reservation in central Wyoming, the only reservation in the state. Home to the Eastern Shoshone and Northern Arapaho tribes.

properties.name: Flathead PRCDA
properties.description: The Flathead PRCDA covers the Flathead Indian Reservation in northwest Montana, home to the Confederated Salish and Kootenai Tribes (CSKT).

properties.name: Pine Ridge PRCDA
properties.description: The Pine Ridge PRCDA covers the Pine Ridge Indian Reservation in southwestern South Dakota, the second-largest reservation in the US. Home to the Oglala Lakota (Sioux) people.

properties.name: Rosebud PRCDA
properties.description: The Rosebud PRCDA covers the Rosebud Indian Reservation in south-central South Dakota, home to the Sicangu Lakota (Rosebud Sioux) people.

properties.name: Cheyenne River PRCDA
properties.description: The Cheyenne River PRCDA covers the Cheyenne River Indian Reservation in north-central South Dakota, one of the largest reservations in the country. Home to four bands of the Lakota people.

properties.name: Standing Rock PRCDA
properties.description: The Standing Rock PRCDA covers the Standing Rock Indian Reservation, which spans the North Dakota-South Dakota border. Home to the Hunkpapa and Sihasapa bands of the Lakota people.

properties.name: Lower Brule PRCDA
properties.description: The Lower Brule PRCDA covers the Lower Brule Indian Reservation in central South Dakota along the Missouri River. Home to the Kul Wicasa (Lower Brule Sioux) people.

properties.name: Crow Creek PRCDA
properties.description: The Crow Creek PRCDA covers the Crow Creek Indian Reservation in central South Dakota, home to the Crow Creek Sioux (Hinhankaga) people.

properties.name: Yankton Sioux PRCDA
properties.description: The Yankton Sioux PRCDA covers the Yankton Indian Reservation in southeastern South Dakota, home to the Ihanktonwan (Yankton) Dakota people.

properties.name: Sisseton-Wahpeton PRCDA
properties.description: The Sisseton-Wahpeton PRCDA covers the Lake Traverse Reservation in northeastern South Dakota, home to the Sisseton-Wahpeton Oyate (Dakota people).

properties.name: Spirit Lake PRCDA
properties.description: The Spirit Lake PRCDA covers the Spirit Lake Indian Reservation in central North Dakota, home to the Spirit Lake Nation (formerly Devils Lake Sioux).

properties.name: Turtle Mountain PRCDA
properties.tribeName: Turtle Mountain Band of Chippewa Indians
properties.description: The Turtle Mountain PRCDA covers the Turtle Mountain Indian Reservation in north-central North Dakota near the Canadian border. One of the most densely populated reservations in the US.

properties.name: Flandreau Santee PRCDA
properties.description: The Flandreau Santee PRCDA covers the Flandreau Indian Reservation in eastern South Dakota, home to the Flandreau Santee Sioux Tribe.

properties.name: Winnebago-Omaha PRCDA
properties.description: The Winnebago-Omaha PRCDA covers both the Winnebago and Omaha Indian Reservations in northeastern Nebraska along the Missouri River.

properties.name: Navajo Nation PRCDA
properties.description: The Navajo Nation PRCDA covers the Navajo Nation, the largest Indian reservation in the United States spanning parts of Arizona, New Mexico, and Utah. Home to the Dine (Navajo) people, it covers approximately 27,413 square miles.

properties.name: Gila River PRCDA
properties.description: The Gila River PRCDA covers the Gila River Indian Community south of Phoenix, Arizona. Home to the Akimel O'odham (Pima) and Pee-Posh (Maricopa) peoples.

properties.name: Salt River PRCDA
properties.description: The Salt River PRCDA covers the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community in the eastern Phoenix/Scottsdale metropolitan area.

properties.name: White Mountain Apache PRCDA
properties.description: The White Mountain Apache PRCDA covers the Fort Apache Indian Reservation in east-central Arizona, home to the White Mountain Apache Tribe.

properties.name: San Carlos Apache PRCDA
properties.description: The San Carlos Apache PRCDA covers the San Carlos Apache Indian Reservation in east-central Arizona, one of the largest reservations in Arizona.

properties.name: Hopi PRCDA
properties.description: The Hopi PRCDA covers the Hopi Reservation in northeastern Arizona, an enclave entirely surrounded by the Navajo Nation. Home to the Hopi people, one of the oldest continuously inhabited communities in North America.

properties.name: Tohono O'odham PRCDA
properties.description: The Tohono O'odham PRCDA covers the Tohono O'odham Nation in southern Arizona west of Tucson, the second-largest reservation in the US. The nation's territory extends to the Mexican border.

properties.name: Ak-Chin PRCDA
properties.description: The Ak-Chin PRCDA covers the Ak-Chin Indian Community south of Phoenix, Arizona. Home to the Ak-Chin O'odham people.

properties.name: Fort McDowell PRCDA
properties.description: The Fort McDowell PRCDA covers the Fort McDowell Yavapai Nation northeast of Phoenix, Arizona.

properties.name: Colorado River PRCDA
properties.description: The Colorado River PRCDA covers the Colorado River Indian Reservation along the Colorado River near Parker, Arizona. Home to the Mohave, Chemehuevi, Hopi, and Navajo peoples.

properties.name: Hualapai PRCDA
properties.description: The Hualapai PRCDA covers the Hualapai Indian Reservation in northwestern Arizona, along the southern rim of the Grand Canyon.

properties.name: Havasupai PRCDA
properties.description: The Havasupai PRCDA covers the Havasupai Indian Reservation deep within the Grand Canyon in Arizona. One of the most remote communities in the United States, accessible only by foot, horse, or helicopter.

properties.name: Uintah and Ouray PRCDA
properties.description: The Uintah and Ouray PRCDA covers the Uintah and Ouray Indian Reservation in northeastern Utah, the second-largest reservation in the US by area. Home to the Ute Indian Tribe.

properties.name: Warm Springs PRCDA
properties.description: The Warm Springs PRCDA covers the Warm Springs Indian Reservation in central Oregon, home to the Confederated Tribes of Warm Springs.

properties.name: Yakama PRCDA
properties.tribeName: Confederated Tribes and Bands of the Yakama Nation
properties.description: The Yakama PRCDA covers the Yakama Indian Reservation in south-central Washington, home to the Confederated Tribes and Bands of the Yakama Nation.

properties.name: Colville PRCDA
properties.tribeName: Confederated Tribes of the Colville Reservation
properties.description: The Colville PRCDA covers the Colville Indian Reservation in north-central Washington, one of the largest reservations in Washington state.

properties.name: Umatilla PRCDA
properties.tribeName: Confederated Tribes of the Umatilla Indian Reservation
properties.description: The Umatilla PRCDA covers the Umatilla Indian Reservation in northeastern Oregon near Pendleton, home to the Cayuse, Umatilla, and Walla Walla tribes.

properties.name: Nez Perce PRCDA
properties.description: The Nez Perce PRCDA covers the Nez Perce Indian Reservation in north-central Idaho, homeland of the Nimiipuu (Nez Perce) people.

properties.name: Coeur d'Alene PRCDA
properties.description: The Coeur d'Alene PRCDA covers the Coeur d'Alene Indian Reservation in northern Idaho, home to the Schitsu'umsh (Coeur d'Alene) people.

properties.name: Fort Hall PRCDA
properties.description: The Fort Hall PRCDA covers the Fort Hall Indian Reservation in southeastern Idaho, home to the Shoshone-Bannock Tribes.

properties.name: Tulalip PRCDA
properties.description: The Tulalip PRCDA covers the Tulalip Indian Reservation north of Seattle in western Washington, along the Puget Sound coast.

properties.name: Lummi PRCDA
properties.description: The Lummi PRCDA covers the Lummi Indian Reservation in northwest Washington near Bellingham, home to the Lummi Nation (Lhaq'temish people).

properties.name: Makah PRCDA
properties.description: The Makah PRCDA covers the Makah Indian Reservation at the northwestern tip of the Olympic Peninsula in Washington state, home to the Makah (Qwi-dich-cha-at) people.

properties.name: Cherokee Nation PRCDA
properties.description: The Cherokee Nation PRCDA covers the Cherokee Nation jurisdictional area in northeastern Oklahoma, a 14-county service area. The Cherokee Nation is the largest tribal nation in the United States.

properties.name: Chickasaw Nation PRCDA
properties.description: The Chickasaw Nation PRCDA covers the Chickasaw Nation boundaries in south-central Oklahoma, a 13-county jurisdictional area.

properties.name: Choctaw Nation PRCDA
properties.description: The Choctaw Nation PRCDA covers the Choctaw Nation of Oklahoma jurisdictional area in southeastern Oklahoma, spanning 10.5 counties.

properties.name: Muscogee (Creek) Nation PRCDA
properties.description: The Muscogee (Creek) Nation PRCDA covers the Muscogee Nation jurisdictional boundaries in east-central Oklahoma, an 11-county service area.

properties.name: Osage Nation PRCDA
properties.description: The Osage Nation PRCDA covers Osage County in north-central Oklahoma, the Osage Nation reservation. It is the largest county in Oklahoma.

properties.name: Seminole Nation PRCDA
properties.description: The Seminole Nation PRCDA covers the Seminole Nation jurisdictional area in central Oklahoma, primarily Seminole County.

properties.name: Acoma-Canoncito-Laguna PRCDA
properties.tribeName: Pueblos of Acoma, Canoncito, and Laguna
properties.description: The Acoma-Canoncito-Laguna PRCDA covers the service areas for the Pueblos of Acoma, Canoncito (To'Hajiilee), and Laguna in west-central New Mexico.

properties.name: Zuni PRCDA
properties.description: The Zuni PRCDA covers the Zuni Pueblo and surrounding lands in western New Mexico, home to the A:shiwi (Zuni) people, one of the oldest continuously inhabited settlements in North America.

properties.name: Mescalero Apache PRCDA
properties.description: The Mescalero Apache PRCDA covers the Mescalero Apache Reservation in south-central New Mexico in the Sacramento Mountains.

properties.name: Jicarilla Apache PRCDA
properties.description: The Jicarilla Apache PRCDA covers the Jicarilla Apache Reservation in northern New Mexico, home to the Jicarilla Apache Nation.

properties.name: Southern Ute PRCDA
properties.description: The Southern Ute PRCDA covers the Southern Ute Indian Reservation in southwestern Colorado, a checkerboard reservation.

properties.name: Ute Mountain Ute PRCDA
properties.description: The Ute Mountain Ute PRCDA covers the Ute Mountain Ute Reservation in southwestern Colorado and northwestern New Mexico, near the Four Corners region.

properties.name: Northern Pueblos PRCDA
properties.description: The Northern Pueblos PRCDA covers the service area for the Eight Northern Pueblos in north-central New Mexico around Santa Fe and Espanola, including Ohkay Owingeh, Santa Clara, San Ildefonso, Pojoaque, Nambe, Tesuque, Picuris, and Taos pueblos.

properties.name: Eastern Cherokee PRCDA
properties.description: The Eastern Cherokee PRCDA covers the Qualla Boundary and surrounding trust lands in the Great Smoky Mountains of western North Carolina, home to the Eastern Band of Cherokee Indians.

properties.name: Mississippi Choctaw PRCDA
properties.description: The Mississippi Choctaw PRCDA covers the trust lands and service area of the Mississippi Band of Choctaw Indians in east-central Mississippi, spread across several communities.

properties.name: Poarch Creek PRCDA
properties.description: The Poarch Creek PRCDA covers the service area of the Poarch Band of Creek Indians in southwestern Alabama, the only federally recognized tribe in Alabama.

properties.name: Seminole Tribe of Florida PRCDA
properties.description: The Seminole Tribe of Florida PRCDA covers the reservations and service areas of the Seminole Tribe of Florida, including Hollywood, Big Cypress, Brighton, and other reservations across southern Florida.

properties.name: Pascua Yaqui PRCDA
properties.description: The Pascua Yaqui PRCDA covers the Pascua Yaqui Reservation near Tucson, Arizona. Home to the Pascua Yaqui people, whose traditional homeland spans both sides of the US-Mexico border.

properties.name: Red Lake PRCDA
properties.tribeName: Red Lake Band of Chippewa Indians
properties.description: The Red Lake PRCDA covers the Red Lake Indian Reservation in north-central Minnesota, the only closed (not allotted) reservation in Minnesota. Home to the Red Lake Band of Chippewa Indians.

properties.name: Leech Lake PRCDA
properties.description: The Leech Lake PRCDA covers the Leech Lake Indian Reservation in north-central Minnesota, one of the largest reservations in the state. Home to the Leech Lake Band of Ojibwe.

properties.name: White Earth PRCDA
properties.description: The White Earth PRCDA covers the White Earth Indian Reservation in northwestern Minnesota, the largest reservation in the state. Home to the White Earth Nation (Ojibwe).

properties.name: Fond du Lac PRCDA
properties.tribeName: Fond du Lac Band of Lake Superior Chippewa
properties.description: The Fond du Lac PRCDA covers the Fond du Lac Indian Reservation in northeastern Minnesota near Duluth.

properties.name: Mille Lacs PRCDA
properties.description: The Mille Lacs PRCDA covers the service area of the Mille Lacs Band of Ojibwe in central Minnesota, including lands around Mille Lacs Lake.

properties.name: Menominee PRCDA
properties.description: The Menominee PRCDA covers the Menominee Indian Reservation in northeastern Wisconsin, home to the Menominee Indian Tribe. The reservation is coextensive with Menominee County.

properties.name: Oneida PRCDA
properties.description: The Oneida PRCDA covers the Oneida Nation reservation near Green Bay in northeastern Wisconsin.
